basic_details.organization_name: Indira Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences (IGIMS)
basic_details.short_information: Indira Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences (IGIMS) Medical Physicist (Nuclear Medicine) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of the Indira Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences (https://www.igims.org). A total of 1 Medical Physicist (Nuclear Medicine) vacancy has been announced through the IGIMS Medical Physicist (Nuclear Medicine) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. Nuclear Medicine Technology from a recognized University/Institution, RSO Level-II Certification recognized by AERB

content_sections.heading: IGIMS Medical Physicist (Nuclear Medicine) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IGIMS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IGIMS Medical Physicist (Nuclear Medicine) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IGIMS Medical Physicist (Nuclear Medicine) Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. Nuclear Medicine Technology from a recognized University/Institution RSO Level-II Certification recognized by AERB

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IGIMS Medical Physicist (Nuclear Medicine) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IGIMS Medical Physicist (Nuclear Medicine) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post being advertised by IGIMS?
faq.answer: Indira Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences (IGIMS) is recruiting for the post of Medical Physicist (Nuclear Medicine).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Physicist (Nuclear Medicine) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Medical Physicist (Nuclear Medicine) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 20-07-2026.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Medical Physicist (Nuclear Medicine) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Nuclear Medicine Technology from a recognized University/Institution and RSO Level-II Certification recognized by AERB.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 60 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Medical Physicist (Nuclear Medicine) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 90000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for the Medical Physicist (Nuclear Medicine) recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1000/- for General/OBC and Rs. 1000/- for SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Indira Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences (IGIMS), Patna, Bihar.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.
